name: Cucumber Kimchi"oi Kimchi
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle cucumbers with 3 tablespoons salt and rub gently until they begin to soften.
2. Wash the cucumbers and cut off both ends. Cut each cucumber in half lengthwise, make a deep slash down the center of each half, almost all the way through but not quite, then fold the cucumber halves open and stuff them.
3. For longer cucumbers, cut them into thirds first before making the slashes.
4. Shred the giant white radish and sprinkle with powdered pepper. Combine shredded green onions, minced garlic, minced ginger, 1 tablespoon salt, and mix well.
5. Stuff the mixture of green onion, garlic, ginger, and salt into the cucumber slits and pack tightly into a jar or crock.
6. Mix the radish juice, 2 1/2 cups water, and 1/2 tablespoon salt together in a bowl. Pour this brine over the cucumbers in the jar until they are completely covered. Seal the container with plastic wrap or its own lid.
7. Let stand at room temperature for 2 days before consuming.
